title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
